text: Audience member's job title is unusual or specific - lawyer, accountant, dentist, engineer, nurse, teacher.
Job is famously stressful, boring, or stereotyped - HR, IT support, finance, consulting.
Audience member names a small or unexpected city - Tulsa, Cleveland, Boise, Bakersfield, Toledo.
Audience member is from a place with a strong stereotype - Florida, Texas, Brooklyn, LA.
First date or new couple in the audience admits how long they've been together.
Long-term couple - married ten plus years, kids at home.
Audience member is celebrating birthday, anniversary, divorce, retirement, promotion, breakup.
Bachelor or bachelorette party in the audience.
Visiting from out of town, here for a conference, wedding, or vacation.
Audience member is drunk, ordering more drinks, or visibly tipsy.
Audience member is the only sober one in their group, designated driver.
Audience member arrived late, walked in during the set, sitting up front.
Front row, close to stage - eye contact, awkward proximity.
Audience member is on their phone, texting, or filming.
Heckler interrupts, shouts back, makes unwelcome comments.
Audience member is silent, stoic, doesn't laugh at anything.
One person in audience has a loud distinctive laugh, snort, or cackle.
Someone brought their parents, kids, or grandparents to a comedy show.
Audience member is a student, in college, in grad school, or just graduated.
Audience member works in tech, AI, startups, crypto, or VC.
Audience member is in medicine - doctor, nurse, vet, EMT, dentist, therapist.
Audience member works for government, military, intelligence, or politics.
Audience member is in entertainment - actor, writer, musician, artist.
Earlier joke, person, or detail from the show that can be referenced again.
Audience member has a memorable, unusual, or punny name.
Audience member is wearing something striking - costume, suit at a casual show, branded gear.
Single, divorced, dating, recently dumped, on dating apps.
Audience member has unusual pet, lots of pets, or no pets when expected.
Gym, running, yoga, crossfit, marathon training - exercise as identity.
Diet identity - vegan, keto, gluten-free, carnivore, picky eater.
